entries.title: AI Systems Engineer
bulletPoints: Architected an autonomous multi-agent pipeline for analyzing public government contracts using OCR, scraping, search, fact-verification, and LLM summarization.
Built a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system with LangChain, PostgreSQL, and VoyageAI embeddings enabling semantic contract intelligence.
Implemented distributed embedding pipelines and async job queues to categorize millions of contracts in parallel.

entries.title: AI Systems Engineer
bulletPoints: Engineered a multi-stage RAG system combining vector search (OpenSearch), BM25, MMR retrieval, and LLM reranking for university knowledge systems.
Built an asynchronous FastAPI backend with conversation memory, feedback loops, and automated knowledge ingestion pipelines.

entries.title: AI Developer
bulletPoints: Developed AI knowledge assistants for Czech and Slovak municipalities using LangChain and vector search (PGVector).
Implemented AI-driven form automation enabling structured data completion from internal municipal datasets.

entries.title: Think Tank Member & Programmer
bulletPoints: Developed an AI assistant for a digital campus platform serving 200k+ students across 10 European universities.
Collaborated with partner institutions on AI deployment strategy, governance, and GDPR compliance.
